title: Min Stack
description:
Design a stack that supports `push`, `pop`, `top`, and retrieving the minimum
element in constant time.

Implement the `MinStack` class: `push(val)`, `pop()`, `top()`, and `getMin()`.
constraints: pop, top, getMin are only called on a non-empty stack.

solutions.summary: Alongside each value, store the minimum seen so far.

steps.title: Keep a parallel minimum stack
steps.explanation: Push the running minimum next to each value so `getMin` is just a peek.
